{{CargoRelic
|name=Lyre of Hermes
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|birthday=04-07
|source=Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wishing (0.08%)
|description=On Apr 7, 5000 BC, God made Hermes invent this instrument.

Apollo pursued Hermes for stealing a herd of cattle from him. To appease Apollo's wrath, Hermes made a seven-stringed lyre out of tortoiseshell, entrails, and horns from cows. When Apollo played the lyre, the goddesses of Olympus were attracted by its beautiful sound, so Apollo forgave Hermes.
|fame=65
|art=108
|fth=68
|civ=47
|tech=74
|ss1=Snail ATK +30<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail HP +60<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail ATK +6
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail HP +80<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail ATK +8
|ss3=Snail ATK +50<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail HP +100<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail ATK +10
|ss4=Snail ATK +70<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail HP +140<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail ATK +14
|ss5=Snail ATK +90<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail HP +180<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail ATK +18
|ss6=Snail ATK +120<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail HP +240<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail ATK +24
|ss7=Snail ATK +120<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail HP +240<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail ATK +24<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1={{Skills|hellas|green card|15%}}
|skill2={{Skills|hellas|blue card|15%}}
|skill3={{Skills|hellas|purple card|15%}}
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Gear Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Hellas Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:God Descent Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:DNA Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards Organs]]
[[Category:Stan Boost]]
[[Category:Sanctum Warrior Boost]]
